goal: Alternatif SPSS/alat hitung statistika yang ramah user awam dan tetap detail untuk user ahli.
ui_principles: Hindari tab bertumpuk yang merender semua fitur sekaligus
Setiap output statistik harus punya interpretasi dan saran tindakan
key_features: Data View dan Variable View ala SPSS
Kompatibilitas data dan data repair assistant
Smart Assistant dan wizard rekomendasi uji
Analisis Lanjutan: bootstrapping, effect size, ANCOVA, MANOVA, repeated measures ANOVA
Mediasi dan moderasi sederhana dengan bootstrap indirect effect
Forecasting sederhana: moving average, exponential smoothing, trend linear
Missing value analysis dan custom tables/crosstab
Validation/benchmark checklist dan runtime.txt Python 3.11 untuk Streamlit Cloud
known_fixed_bugs: Advanced section uses explicit widget keys to reduce DuplicateElementKey risk
Advanced features use number input/radio instead of risky sliders
Missing pattern table handles duplicate column names safely
must_keep_guards: Never create st.slider when min_value == max_value
Use explicit widget keys for new widgets
Wrap feature renderers in local try/except
recommended_next_work: PDF report builder with publication-quality styling
Project save/load format including data, metadata, outputs, and syntax log
Validation benchmark suite with known datasets and expected SPSS/R outputs
Multiple imputation and Little MCAR test
